title: ElytraKey
description: A mod to help you (un)equip your elytra faster than ever before!
body:
# ElytraKey

A clientside only mod to help you (un)equip your Elytra faster.

## Features
- Hotkey to swap between Chestplate and Elytra (default: R)
- Optional configurable features to automatically equip Elytra (default: K)
  - When holding a firework
  - Or/and when falling
- Automatically switch back to Chestplate when landing
- Easy Take-off feature
  - Automatically equip Elytra, jump and boost when right clicking a rocket

## Source code
[https://github.com/Packsolite/elytrakey-fabric](https://github.com/Packsolite/elytrakey-fabric)
